nasb.text: then you shall exchange it for money, and bind the money in your hand and go to the place which the Lord your God chooses.

esv.text: then you shall turn it into money and bind up the money in your hand and go to the place that the Lord your God chooses

cnv.text: 你就可以換成銀子，把銀子拿在手裡，到耶和華你的　神選擇的地方去，

ccb.text: 就可以把那些收成换成银钱带去。
